description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests, excluding changes to markdown files. The workflow has four ubuntu-latest jobs: special_debugRelease for a debug build with coverage, special_releaseValgrind for a release build with valgrind, special_releaseSanitizers for a release build with sanitizers, and special_allEnabled for a build with all options enabled and documentation. Each job installs dependencies, configures Conan, and performs a build and test.
